vllm.title: Fix the broken sampler tests
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the broken sampler tests since #1843
I extracted the fix from @Yard1's PR #1889, since we need to merge this before the next release (while #1889 will likely be merged after the release). Also, I polished the code a bit.
Thanks @Yard1 for finding out the bug and making the fix!

vllm.title: Add Production Metrics in Prometheus format
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This one builds on #1662. It adds aioprometheus as a dependency which is very lightweight. It exposes the metrics as we perform the regular logging pass in engine step. The memory usage is very small and constant (there is no history, only current state). The metrics is designed to be scraped and st

vllm.title: Add PyTorch-native implementation of custom layers
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the pytorch-native implementation of the custom ops to the _forward() method of the corresponding layers. While the _forward() method will be never called at the moment, this change will bring the following benefits:

It helps users understand the custom layers
It can be used for debugg

vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes test_worker.py and renames to test_model_runner.py.
